ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., auditory, visual) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population being studied (e.g., adults, children) */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the experiment */,
  "num_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials in the experiment */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the experiment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subject (e.g., fc2v) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the participant's data */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (e.g., left, right, ambidextrous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus is part of */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., sound, image) */,
  "stimulus_value" TEXT /* Value of the stimulus (e.g., 440Hz, red) */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus in seconds */,
  "stimulus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the stimulus (e.g., decibels, lumens) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the response is for */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to make the response */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Whether the response was accurate */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition is part of */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., congruent, incongruent) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition (e.g., c, i) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial is part of */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the trial is for */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the trial is for */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response for the trial */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index of the trial in the experiment */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed since the start of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version is for */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
